DSDS 0.1
Overview Root Schema
example extensions link metadata rich-text status usecase
component pattern style theme token
accessibility anatomy api best-practice design-specifications guideline interaction principle purpose scale state variant

DSDS Design Specifications Guideline

Documents the visual design specifications of a component — the design tokens it consumes, its internal and external spacing relationships, dimension constraints, typography settings, and responsive behavior. Design specifications bridge the gap between design intent and engineering implementation by making every visual decision explicit, measurable, and tied to the token architecture.

Source: guidelines/design-specifications.schema.json

6 definitions in this file:

  • spacingSpec
  • sizingSpec
  • typographyEntrySpec
  • typographySpec
  • responsiveEntry
  • designSpecifications

spacingSpec

Spacing specifications documenting the spatial relationships within and around the component. Separates internal spacing (owned by the component) from external spacing (recommended by the component but controlled by the parent layout).

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
internalmap<string, string>optionalPadding and internal gaps within the component. Keys are named spatial relationships between anatomy parts or edges (e.g., 'container-horizontal', 'container-vertical', 'icon-to-label', 'label-to-description'). Values are token names or resolved values (e.g., 'space-4', '8px'). Internal spacing is owned by the component and does not change based on context.
externalmap<string, string>optionalRecommended margins and gaps between this component and its siblings or container edges. Keys are named spatial relationships to surrounding elements (e.g., 'button-to-button', 'button-group-gap', 'stack-gap'). Values are token names or resolved values. External spacing is a recommendation — the parent layout ultimately controls the space between components.

sizingSpec

Dimension constraints defining the minimum and maximum bounds of the component and any aspect ratio requirements. All values are token names or resolved CSS values.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
minWidthstringoptionalMinimum width as a token name or resolved value (e.g., 'size-button-min-width', '64px').
maxWidthstringoptionalMaximum width as a token name or resolved value (e.g., 'size-dialog-max-width', '600px').
minHeightstringoptionalMinimum height as a token name or resolved value (e.g., 'size-button-min-height', '44px').
maxHeightstringoptionalMaximum height as a token name or resolved value.
aspectRatiostringoptionalAspect ratio constraint as a ratio string (e.g., '16/9', '1/1', '4/3').

typographyEntrySpec

Typographic settings for a single text element within the component. Maps CSS typographic properties to token names or resolved values. When a composite typeToken is provided, the individual properties (fontSize, fontWeight, etc.) serve as documentation of what the token resolves to.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
fontFamilystringoptionalFont family token name or resolved value (e.g., 'font-family-body', 'Inter, sans-serif').
fontSizestringoptionalFont size token name or resolved value (e.g., 'font-size-body', '14px', '0.875rem').
fontWeightstringoptionalFont weight token name or resolved value (e.g., 'font-weight-regular', '400', 'bold').
lineHeightstringoptionalLine height token name or resolved value (e.g., 'line-height-body', '1.5', '20px').
letterSpacingstringoptionalLetter spacing token name or resolved value (e.g., 'letter-spacing-body', '0.01em').
textTransformstringoptionalText transform value (e.g., 'uppercase', 'capitalize', 'none').
typeTokenstringoptionalA composite typography token that encapsulates multiple typographic properties (e.g., '$body-compact-01', 'type-scale-body-sm'). When a type token is provided, individual properties (fontSize, fontWeight, etc.) serve as documentation of what the token resolves to.

typographySpec

Typographic specifications for text content within the component. Keys are named text elements that correspond to anatomy parts (e.g., 'label', 'helper-text', 'heading', 'body'). Values are typographyEntrySpec objects mapping CSS typographic properties to token names or resolved values.

object

Open map: keys are strings, values are any

References: typographyEntrySpec

responsiveEntry

A responsive behavior specification describing how the component adapts at a specific breakpoint or viewport condition.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
breakpointstringrequiredThe breakpoint name or value at which this behavior applies (e.g., 'small', 'medium', 'large', '768px', 'min-width: 1024px').
descriptionrichTextrequiredHow the component's layout, sizing, or behavior changes at this breakpoint.

References: richText

Example

[
  {
    "breakpoint": "768px",
    "description": "Below 768px, buttons in a button group stack vertically and expand to full width."
  },
  {
    "breakpoint": "1024px",
    "description": "Above 1024px, the minimum button width increases from 44px to 64px to provide a more comfortable click target on desktop."
  }
]

designSpecifications

Documents the measurable visual specifications of a component — every token reference, spacing relationship, dimension constraint, typographic setting, and responsive adaptation. This guideline type makes design decisions explicit so that engineers can implement them precisely and reviewers can verify them against the design.

object

PropertyTypeRequiredDescription
type"design-specifications"requiredIdentifies this guideline as a design specifications document.
tokensstring[]at least oneAll design token names consumed by this component, across all variants and states. Provides a flat inventory of every token the component depends on. Individual variant and state guidelines document which tokens apply in specific configurations.
spacingspacingSpecat least one
sizingsizingSpecat least one
typographytypographySpecat least one
responsiveresponsiveEntry[]at least oneResponsive behavior documentation describing how the component adapts across breakpoints. Entries are ordered from smallest to largest breakpoint.

Constraint: At least one of tokens, spacing, sizing, typography, responsive must be present.

References: spacingSpec, sizingSpec, typographySpec, responsiveEntry

Example

{
  "tokens": [
    "button-background",
    "button-text-color",
    "button-border-color",
    "button-border-radius",
    "button-padding-horizontal",
    "button-padding-vertical",
    "button-font-size",
    "button-font-weight",
    "button-line-height",
    "button-icon-size",
    "button-icon-color",
    "button-icon-gap",
    "button-focus-ring-color",
    "button-focus-ring-width",
    "button-focus-ring-offset"
  ],
  "spacing": {
    "internal": {
      "container-horizontal": "space-4",
      "container-vertical": "space-2",
      "icon-to-label": "space-2"
    },
    "external": {
      "button-to-button": "space-2",
      "button-group-gap": "space-3"
    }
  },
  "sizing": {
    "minWidth": "44px",
    "minHeight": "44px",
    "maxWidth": "none",
    "aspectRatio": "auto"
  },
  "responsive": [
    {
      "breakpoint": "768px",
      "description": "Below 768px, buttons in a button group stack vertically and expand to full width."
    },
    {
      "breakpoint": "1024px",
      "description": "Above 1024px, the minimum button width increases from 44px to 64px."
    }
  ],
  "type": "design-specifications"
}
